[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 11010111 6
1 10110101 5
2 10110110 5
3 01101011 5
4 10100010 3
5 01001111 5
6 00010101 3
7 00101000 2

01 10 00000000 a
12 21 00100000 1
23 32 01110000 3
34 43 10110010 4
45 54 00100010 2
56 65 00100010 2
67 76 00000010 1
70 07 00000101 2

02 20 00010101 3 match 6
13 31 00101000 2 match 7
24 42 00110100 3
35 53 01101010 4
46 64 10100010 3 match 4
57 75 01001011 4
60 06 00000000 a
71 17 00001000 1

03 30 00010000 1
14 41 00100000 1
25 52 01100001 3
36 63 10100010 3 match 4
47 74 00000110 2
50 05 00000001 1
61 16 00100000 1
72 27 01000101 3

04 40 00010100 2
15 51 00101000 2 match 7
26 62 00100000 1
37 73 01001010 3
